name: healthcare_cold_chain_excursion_threatens_mesa_st_lt
premise: A Healthcare clinical command center is in a fast-moving incident involving healthcare cold chain excursion threatens mesa st lt. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before markets open. Every delay increases patient safety, triage integrity, and privacy. Stakeholders are already framing this as short term vs long term under pressure. A whistleblower has already contacted media; the narrative is forming now. Constraints: Ensure a usable human override/appeals path. Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability.

agents.name: Harper Sato
agents.identity: I am Harper Sato, accountable for a defensible call in Healthcare when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays long term for short term.

agents.name: Hector Patel
agents.identity: I am Hector Patel, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Healthcare.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so long term isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of short term.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect long term.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to long term to secure short term under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before markets open. Evidence is partial. Harper Sato must decide under short term vs long term. What does Harper Sato do?
